description: PassThresholds in CRIT-703, CRIT-704, CRIT-705, and CRIT-712 invoke `bun run test inside promptnotes/`. That script does not exist in `promptnotes/package.json` (only `dev`, `build`, `preview`, `check`, `check:watch`, `test:dom`, `test:dom:watch`, `tauri` are defined). `bun run test` will exit non-zero with a 'script not found' error, so every passThreshold relying on it is unsatisfiable as written. Phase 3 reviewers cannot evaluate these criteria without redefining the command.

evidence.snippet: "scripts": { "dev": "vite dev", "build": "vite build", "preview": "vite preview", "check": "svelte-kit sync && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json", "check:watch": "svelte-kit sync && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json --watch", "test:dom": "vitest run", "test:dom:watch": "vitest", "tauri": "tauri" }
